title: Overbroad IP Assignment
explanation: Assigning pre-existing IP beyond project scope is non-standard and likely unenforceable against the contractor's prior works.
remediation_template: Narrow assignment to work product created during engagement period only.

title: Non-Compete Post-Employment
explanation: Non-compete clauses extending beyond employment/engagement are void under Indian Contract Act §27.
remediation_template: Remove non-compete or limit to non-solicitation during engagement term only.

title: Termination Without Cause
explanation: Immediate termination without cause or notice is non-standard for Indian freelance contracts.
remediation_template: Require 30 days written notice for termination without cause.

title: Unilateral Payment Delay
explanation: Payment terms exceeding 30-45 days are non-standard and create cash-flow risk.
remediation_template: Payment terms within 30 days of invoice approval.

title: Unlimited Liability
explanation: Unlimited liability clauses are non-standard and expose freelancers to disproportionate risk.
remediation_template: Cap liability at total contract value or ₹5 lakhs, whichever is lower.

title: Vague Performance Standards
explanation: Vague performance standards allow client to terminate for subjective reasons.
citation: Indian Contract Act, 1872 §32 (enforceability of vague terms)

title: Auto-Renewal Trap
explanation: Auto-renewal without explicit notice creates lock-in risk.

title: Broad Confidentiality Obligations
explanation: Perpetual or overbroad confidentiality obligations may restrict future work.
remediation_template: Limit confidentiality to 2-3 years post-engagement, exclude public information.
